executor_steps: Remove the existing annex agree block from component type Car
Add a new annex agree block to component implementation Car.Car_Impl
In the new implementation annex, declare: var Target_Speed_real: real; var Actual_Speed_real: real; var Actual_Speed_real_delayed: real; const max_accel: real = 40.0; var const_tar_speed: bool;
In the new implementation annex, add: assign Target_Speed_real = Target_Speed; assign Actual_Speed_real = Actual_Speed;
In the new implementation annex, add temporal recurrence: Actual_Speed_real_delayed = 0.0 -> pre(Actual_Speed_real);
In the new implementation annex, add: assume "input_bounds": Target_Speed_real >= 0.0 and Target_Speed_real < 150.0;
In the new implementation annex, add: guarantee "speed_limit": const_tar_speed => Actual_Speed_real <= Target_Speed_real;
In the new implementation annex, add: guarantee "acceleration_bound": const_tar_speed => abs(Actual_Speed_real - Actual_Speed_real_delayed) < max_accel;
